cases.description: Explicit generative art request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: create a generative art piece with flow fields and particles
expectations: Produces an algorithmic philosophy (markdown, 4-6 paragraphs) before any code
Reads the viewer.html asset from the skill's assets/ directory before writing HTML
Outputs a single self-contained HTML artifact embedding p5.js from CDN
Uses randomSeed() and noiseSeed() for reproducibility

cases.description: Request phrased as 'p5.js sketch' triggers the skill
cases.prompt: write a p5.js sketch exploring Perlin noise fields
expectations: Final HTML includes Seed / Parameters / Actions sidebar sections

cases.description: Parametric art phrasing triggers the skill
cases.prompt: build an interactive parametric art piece using seeded randomness
expectations: HTML includes range sliders for parameters

cases.description: Static illustration request does NOT trigger algorithmic-art
cases.prompt: design a logo for a coffee shop
expectations: Does NOT produce an algorithmic philosophy markdown
Does NOT output a p5.js sketch

cases.description: Data visualization request does NOT trigger algorithmic-art
cases.prompt: plot the monthly revenue from this CSV as a bar chart
expectations: Does NOT produce an algorithmic philosophy markdown
Produces a standard data-viz approach (e.g., matplotlib, vega-lite, or similar)
